mapper.sql: cg.code_group_seq , cg.code_group_id , cg.code_group_name , cg.description , cg.sort_order , cg.use_yn , cg.create_dt , cg.create_id , cg.create_ip , cg.modify_dt , cg.modify_id , cg.modify_ip , cg.status
mapper.select: SELECT CODE_GROUP_SEQ AS codeGroupSeq , CODE_GROUP_ID AS codeGroupId , CODE_GROUP_NAME AS codeGroupName , DESCRIPTION AS description , SORT_ORDER AS sortOrder , USE_YN AS useYn , STATUS AS status , CREATE_ID AS createId , CREATE_IP AS createIp , DATE_FORMAT(CREATE_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt , MODIFY_ID AS modifyId , MODIFY_IP AS modifyIp , DATE_FORMAT(MODIFY_DT, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modifyDt FROM CODE_GROUP WHERE CODE_GROUP_SEQ = #{codeGroupSeq}

SELECT cg.code_group_id AS value, cg.code_group_name AS label FROM code_group cg WHERE cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY cg.sort_order ASC, cg.code_group_seq ASC
